channel.title: Ajith Kumar – Reflection Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Ajith Kumar – Reflection Blog

item.title: My First Blog
item.description:
First Reflection Blog

Introduction

This is a reflection blog where I will be reflecting back all those learinings that I had from start of the second semester. The name of the course that I have this semester is " Becoming a Reflective Information Scientists"

What I Learned

Explain the knowledge or skills gained.

Challenges

Describe difficulties or problems.

Reflection

Explain your thoughts and insights.

Conclusion

Explain what you will do next or what you learned overall.

item.title: Introduction
item.description:
Hi, my name is Ajith Kumar.
I am a student at Azim Premji University.

This blog is my reflection journal where I will write about my classroom discussions, learning experiences, and learnings from this course.
